ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licensees" (
  "licensee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each licensee */,
  "licensee_name" TEXT /* Name of the licensee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the licensee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the licensee */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued to the licensee */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the licensee's license */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the company */,
  "registered_office" TEXT /* Address of the registered office */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the licensee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the licensee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license */,
  "date_of_issuance" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("licensee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "licensee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the licensee operating the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the brand */,
  "brand_manager" TEXT /* Name of the brand manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the brand manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the brand manager */,
  "brand_status" TEXT /* Current status of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_licensee_id FOREIGN KEY ("licensee_id") REFERENCES licensees ("licensee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand generating the revenue */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the revenue period */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the revenue period */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated during the period */,
  "promos" REAL /* Total promotional spend during the period */,
  "state_tax" REAL /* Total state tax paid during the period */,
  "local_tax" REAL /* Total local tax paid during the period */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the revenue is reported */,
  "net_revenue" REAL /* Net revenue after deducting promotional spend */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Gross revenue before deducting promotional spend */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the revenue data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand running the promotion */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "actual_spend" REAL /* Actual spend on the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion */,
  "estimated_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on revenue */,
  "actual_impact" REAL /* Actual impact on revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand paying the tax */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., State Tax, Local Tax) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax paid */,
  "tax_period" TEXT /* Period for which the tax is paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax was paid */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax payment */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, auditor, financial analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., report, dataset) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., revenue, tax, promos) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the report approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., financial, compliance) */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken based on the findings */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit */,
  "audit_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the audit */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the audit */,
  "audit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., tax, promotional) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the report approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "date_revoked" TEXT /* Date when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_licensee_mapping" (
  "brand_licensee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand-licensee mapping */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "licensee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the licensee */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the brand was assigned to the licensee */,
  "date_revoked" TEXT /* Date when the brand was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_licensee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_licensee_mapping_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_licensee_mapping_licensee_id FOREIGN KEY ("licensee_id") REFERENCES licensees ("licensee_id")
)
